component.name: ASense
component.summary: Control cooling, performance and lighting on Acer laptops

description.p: ASense is a native Linux control center for supported Acer Predator and Nitro laptops. It combines firmware performance profiles, fan control, hardware telemetry and lighting in a compact desktop interface.

Features are enabled independently according to the Linux, Acer WMI and HID interfaces detected on the machine. Predator PHN16-72 is the reference-tested platform, while additional Acer models can expose kernel-backed or detected capabilities.

screenshot.caption: Advanced telemetry and Acer laptop controls

description.p: Stabilizes long-running NVIDIA telemetry, preserves verified controls across transient refresh errors, fixes USB-off charging state decoding and post-resume reconciliation, and bounds control, resize and mutation-lock recovery paths.
